name: Carbonara Pasta
description: Classic Roman pasta with creamy egg sauce, guanciale, Pecorino Romano and black pepper. No cream needed.
instructions:
1. Cook pasta in salted water until al dente.
2. Fry guanciale until crispy, reserve fat.
3. Mix egg yolks with grated Pecorino and black pepper.
4. Drain pasta reserving 1 cup pasta water.
5. Off heat, toss pasta with guanciale and fat.
6. Add egg mixture tossing quickly, add pasta water to create creamy sauce.
7. Serve immediately with extra Pecorino.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Iconic Neapolitan pizza with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella and basil. Simple perfection.
instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250C with a pizza stone.
2. Stretch dough into a thin round.
3. Spread crushed tomatoes leaving a border.
4. Tear mozzarella and distribute evenly.
5. Drizzle with olive oil and season.
6. Bake 8-10 min until crust is charred at edges.
7. Top with fresh basil and serve immediately.

name: Tacos al Pastor
description: Iconic Mexico City street tacos with achiote-marinated pork, pineapple, cilantro and onion on corn tortillas.
instructions:
1. Soak dried chiles in hot water 20 min, blend with achiote, garlic and vinegar.
2. Marinate pork slices in chile sauce overnight.
3. Grill or sear pork on high heat.
4. Warm corn tortillas.
5. Assemble with pork, pineapple, diced onion and cilantro.
6. Serve with lime wedges.

name: Traditional Guacamole
description: Authentic Mexican guacamole with ripe avocados, lime, jalapeno, tomato and cilantro.
instructions:
1. Halve and pit avocados, scoop flesh into bowl.
2. Add finely diced jalapeno, onion, salt and lime juice.
3. Mash coarsely keeping some texture.
4. Fold in diced tomato and chopped cilantro.
5. Taste and adjust salt and lime.
6. Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

name: Chickpea Curry
description: Hearty Indian-style chickpea curry with coconut milk, tomatoes and warming spices.
instructions:
1. Saute diced onion in oil until golden, 8 min.
2. Add garlic and ginger, cook 2 min.
3. Add spices, stir 1 min until fragrant.
4. Add tomatoes, simmer 5 min.
5. Add drained chickpeas and coconut milk.
6. Simmer 15 min until sauce thickens.
7. Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice.

name: Buddha Bowl
description: Nourishing bowl with roasted veggies, quinoa, avocado, edamame and tahini dressing.
instructions:
1. Cook quinoa per package instructions.
2. Roast sweet potato and chickpeas with olive oil and paprika at 200C for 25 min.
3. Massage kale with olive oil and salt.
4. Make tahini dressing: whisk tahini, lemon, garlic, water and salt.
5. Assemble bowls and drizzle with dressing.

name: Sushi Maki Roll
description: Homemade maki rolls with sushi rice, nori, fresh salmon and cucumber.
instructions:
1. Cook sushi rice and season with vinegar, sugar and salt.
2. Place nori on bamboo mat shiny side down.
3. Spread thin layer of rice leaving 2cm at top edge.
4. Place salmon and cucumber along the bottom third.
5. Roll tightly using mat, seal with water.
6. Slice with wet knife into 6-8 pieces.
7. Serve with soy sauce, wasabi and pickled ginger.

name: Chicken Ramen
description: Comforting Japanese ramen with rich chicken broth, chashu chicken, soft-boiled egg and toppings.
instructions:
1. Simmer chicken with garlic and ginger for 2h to make broth.
2. Season broth with soy sauce, mirin and sesame oil.
3. Soft-boil eggs 6 min, cool in ice water, peel and marinate in soy.
4. Shred chicken.
5. Cook noodles per package.
6. Assemble bowls: noodles, hot broth, chicken, halved egg, corn, nori and spring onions.

name: Classic Burger
description: Juicy smash burger with double patties, American cheese, caramelized onions and pickles.
instructions:
1. Mix mayo, ketchup and mustard for special sauce.
2. Caramelize sliced onion on low heat 20 min.
3. Divide beef into 120g balls, season generously.
4. Press onto hot cast iron and smash flat.
5. Cook 2 min until crust forms, flip and add cheese.
6. Toast buns in same pan.
7. Assemble with sauce, lettuce, tomato, onion, patties and pickles.

name: BBQ Ribs
description: Fall-off-the-bone pork baby back ribs with dry rub and smoky BBQ glaze.
instructions:
1. Mix spices and brown sugar for dry rub.
2. Remove membrane from ribs and coat generously.
3. Wrap in foil and refrigerate at least 2h.
4. Bake foil-wrapped at 150C for 2.5-3h.
5. Unwrap, brush with BBQ sauce.
6. Grill 5 min each side until caramelized.
7. Rest 10 min before slicing.

name: Tiramisu
description: Classic Italian dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream and cocoa dusting.
instructions:
1. Separate eggs. Beat yolks with sugar until pale.
2. Fold mascarpone into yolk mixture.
3. Beat egg whites to stiff peaks, fold into mascarpone.
4. Mix cooled espresso with Marsala.
5. Quickly dip ladyfingers in espresso, layer in dish.
6. Spread half the mascarpone cream over ladyfingers.
7. Repeat layers, refrigerate 4h minimum.
8. Dust with cocoa before serving.

name: Strawberry Cheesecake
description: Creamy baked cheesecake on a buttery biscuit crust topped with fresh strawberry sauce.
instructions:
1. Crush biscuits, mix with melted butter, press into springform pan, chill.
2. Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, then sour cream and vanilla.
4. Pour over crust, bake in water bath at 160C for 60-70 min.
5. Cool in oven 1h then refrigerate overnight.
6. Cook strawberries with sugar and lemon until sauce forms.
7. Spoon over cheesecake before serving.

name: Risotto ai Funghi
description: Creamy mushroom risotto with parmesan.
instructions:
1. Saute mushrooms.
2. Toast rice and deglaze with wine.
3. Add broth ladle by ladle.
4. Finish with parmesan and butter.

name: Lasagna Bolognese
description: Classic layered pasta with meat sauce.
instructions:
1. Make bolognese sauce.
2. Make bechamel.
3. Layer pasta, bolognese, bechamel.
4. Bake 45 min at 180C.

name: Gnocchi al Pesto
description: Potato gnocchi with fresh basil pesto.
instructions:
1. Blend basil, pine nuts, parmesan and oil.
2. Cook gnocchi until they float.
3. Toss with pesto and serve.

name: Ossobuco Milanese
description: Braised veal shanks Milanese style.
instructions:
1. Brown the veal shanks.
2. Add wine and vegetables.
3. Braise 2 hours covered.
4. Serve with gremolata.

name: Penne Arrabbiata
description: Spicy tomato pasta.
instructions:
1. Saute garlic and chili.
2. Add crushed tomatoes.
3. Cook sauce 15 min.
4. Toss with al dente pasta.

name: Saltimbocca alla Romana
description: Veal with prosciutto and sage.
instructions:
1. Top veal with prosciutto and sage.
2. Secure with toothpick.
3. Pan fry 2 min each side.
4. Deglaze with white wine.

name: Focaccia Genovese
description: Fluffy Ligurian flatbread.
instructions:
1. Make dough and rest 2 hours.
2. Stretch into pan.
3. Dimple with fingers, add oil and salt.
4. Bake 25 min at 220C.

name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
description: Toasted bread with fresh tomatoes.
instructions:
1. Toast bread slices.
2. Rub with raw garlic.
3. Top with diced tomatoes and basil.
4. Drizzle with olive oil.

name: Enchiladas Verdes
description: Tortillas filled with chicken in green salsa.
instructions:
1. Cook and shred chicken.
2. Fill tortillas and roll.
3. Cover with green salsa.
4. Bake 20 min and top with cream and cheese.

name: Pozole Rojo
description: Hominy corn soup with pork.
instructions:
1. Cook pork until tender.
2. Make chili broth.
3. Combine with hominy.
4. Serve with shredded cabbage and oregano.

name: Chiles Rellenos
description: Stuffed poblano peppers in tomato sauce.
instructions:
1. Roast and peel peppers.
2. Stuff with cheese.
3. Coat in egg batter and fry.
4. Serve in tomato sauce.

name: Cochinita Pibil
description: Slow-cooked achiote pork from Yucatan.
instructions:
1. Marinate pork in achiote and citrus overnight.
2. Wrap in banana leaves.
3. Slow cook 4 hours at 160C.
4. Shred and serve with pickled onion.

name: Sopa de Lima
description: Yucatan lime soup with chicken.
instructions:
1. Cook chicken in broth.
2. Shred chicken and return to broth.
3. Add lime juice.
4. Serve with fried tortilla strips and avocado.

name: Tamales de Rajas
description: Corn dough tamales with poblano strips.
instructions:
1. Soak corn husks.
2. Make masa with lard and broth.
3. Spread masa, add filling, fold.
4. Steam 1 hour.

name: Quesadillas de Flor de Calabaza
description: Squash blossom quesadillas.
instructions:
1. Clean the blossoms.
2. Fill tortillas with cheese and blossoms.
3. Cook on griddle until cheese melts.
4. Serve with green salsa.

name: Mole Negro
description: Complex dark mole with turkey.
instructions:
1. Toast and soak chilies.
2. Blend with chocolate and spices.
3. Fry mole paste.
4. Cook turkey in mole sauce 1 hour.

name: Lentil Dal
description: Indian spiced red lentil soup.
instructions:
1. Saute spices in oil.
2. Add lentils and broth.
3. Cook 20 min.
4. Stir in coconut milk.

name: Mushroom Tacos
description: Crispy portobello mushroom tacos.
instructions:
1. Marinate mushrooms in chipotle.
2. Grill until charred.
3. Warm tortillas.
4. Assemble with avocado and lime.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy chickpea balls in flatbread.
instructions:
1. Blend chickpeas with herbs and spices.
2. Form balls and fry until golden.
3. Spread hummus on flatbread.
4. Add falafel and vegetables.

name: Vegetable Paella
description: Spanish rice with seasonal vegetables.
instructions:
1. Saute vegetables in paella pan.
2. Add rice and saffron.
3. Pour hot broth and do not stir.
4. Cook until socarrat forms.

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
description: Peppers filled with quinoa and vegetables.
instructions:
1. Cook quinoa.
2. Mix with beans and corn.
3. Fill peppers with mixture.
4. Bake 30 min at 180C.

name: Tofu Stir Fry
description: Crispy tofu with vegetables in soy sauce.
instructions:
1. Press and cube tofu.
2. Fry tofu until golden.
3. Stir fry vegetables.
4. Combine with sauce and serve over rice.

name: Cauliflower Curry
description: Roasted cauliflower in tomato curry.
instructions:
1. Roast cauliflower florets.
2. Make curry sauce with tomatoes and spices.
3. Add cauliflower to sauce.
4. Simmer 15 min and serve with rice.

name: Avocado Toast Deluxe
description: Sourdough with smashed avocado and toppings.
instructions:
1. Toast sourdough slices.
2. Smash avocado with lemon and salt.
3. Spread on toast.
4. Top with tomatoes and microgreens.

name: Tonkatsu
description: Breaded pork cutlet with tonkatsu sauce.
instructions:
1. Pound pork thin.
2. Coat in flour, egg, panko.
3. Deep fry until golden.
4. Serve with shredded cabbage and sauce.

name: Gyoza
description: Pan-fried pork and cabbage dumplings.
instructions:
1. Mix filling ingredients.
2. Fill and fold wrappers.
3. Pan fry until bottoms are golden.
4. Add water and steam until cooked.

name: Miso Ramen
description: Rich miso broth ramen with toppings.
instructions:
1. Make rich pork broth.
2. Whisk in miso paste.
3. Cook noodles separately.
4. Assemble with pork, egg and corn.

name: Yakitori
description: Grilled chicken skewers with tare sauce.
instructions:
1. Cut chicken into chunks.
2. Thread on skewers with onion.
3. Grill brushing with tare sauce.
4. Finish with extra sauce.

name: Tempura Udon
description: Thick noodle soup with crispy tempura.
instructions:
1. Make dashi broth with soy and mirin.
2. Make cold tempura batter.
3. Fry shrimp tempura.
4. Serve udon in broth topped with tempura.

name: Karaage
description: Japanese fried chicken, crispy and juicy.
instructions:
1. Marinate chicken in soy, mirin and ginger.
2. Coat in potato starch.
3. Double fry for extra crunch.
4. Serve with mayo and lemon.

name: Okonomiyaki
description: Savory Japanese pancake with cabbage.
instructions:
1. Mix batter with shredded cabbage.
2. Add pork on top.
3. Cook on griddle flipping once.
4. Top with sauce, mayo and bonito flakes.

name: Beef Teriyaki Bowl
description: Glazed beef slices over steamed rice.
instructions:
1. Slice beef thin.
2. Sear in hot pan.
3. Add teriyaki sauce and glaze.
4. Serve over rice with sesame and onion.

name: Mac and Cheese
description: Creamy baked macaroni and cheese.
instructions:
1. Make cheese sauce with butter, flour and milk.
2. Add cheese until melted.
3. Mix with cooked pasta.
4. Top with breadcrumbs and bake 20 min.

name: Buffalo Wings
description: Crispy chicken wings in hot sauce.
instructions:
1. Bake wings at 220C until crispy.
2. Toss in hot sauce and butter.
3. Serve with blue cheese dip and celery.

name: Philly Cheesesteak
description: Steak sandwich with melted cheese.
instructions:
1. Slice steak very thin.
2. Cook with onion and pepper.
3. Top with cheese to melt.
4. Load into toasted hoagie roll.

name: Clam Chowder
description: New England creamy clam soup.
instructions:
1. Cook bacon until crispy.
2. Saute onion in bacon fat.
3. Add potatoes and clam juice.
4. Stir in cream and clams.

name: Pulled Pork Sandwich
description: Slow-cooked pulled pork on brioche.
instructions:
1. Rub pork with spices.
2. Slow cook 8 hours at 120C.
3. Shred and mix with BBQ sauce.
4. Serve on bun with coleslaw.

name: Corn Dog
description: Hot dogs coated in cornbread batter.
instructions:
1. Make cornbread batter.
2. Skewer hot dogs.
3. Dip in batter and deep fry.
4. Serve with mustard and ketchup.

name: Lobster Roll
description: New England lobster in a buttered roll.
instructions:
1. Cook lobster and chop meat.
2. Mix with mayo, celery and lemon.
3. Toast bun with butter.
4. Fill with lobster mixture.

name: Chicken and Waffles
description: Crispy fried chicken on fluffy waffles.
instructions:
1. Marinate chicken in buttermilk.
2. Coat in seasoned flour and fry.
3. Make waffles.
4. Serve chicken on waffles with maple syrup.

name: Creme Brulee
description: Classic French custard with caramel top.
instructions:
1. Heat cream with vanilla.
2. Mix with yolks and sugar.
3. Bake in water bath 45 min.
4. Chill, then torch sugar top.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with molten center.
instructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter.
2. Whisk in eggs and sugar.
3. Fold in flour.
4. Bake 12 min — center stays molten.

name: Panna Cotta
description: Italian cream dessert with berry coulis.
instructions:
1. Heat cream with sugar and vanilla.
2. Dissolve gelatin and mix in.
3. Pour into molds and chill 4 hours.
4. Serve with berry coulis.

name: Apple Pie
description: Classic American apple pie.
instructions:
1. Make or buy pie crust.
2. Slice apples and mix with sugar and cinnamon.
3. Fill crust and top with lattice.
4. Bake 50 min at 190C.

name: Profiteroles
description: Choux pastry with cream and chocolate.
instructions:
1. Make choux and pipe balls.
2. Bake until golden and hollow.
3. Fill with whipped cream.
4. Drizzle with melted chocolate.

name: Churros con Chocolate
description: Fried dough sticks with hot chocolate dip.
instructions:
1. Make thick choux dough.
2. Pipe and fry in hot oil.
3. Roll in cinnamon sugar.
4. Serve with thick hot chocolate for dipping.

name: Mango Sorbet
description: Refreshing mango sorbet, dairy free.
instructions:
1. Blend mango with syrup and lime.
2. Churn in ice cream machine.
3. Freeze 2 hours.
4. Serve with fresh mint.

name: Banana Foster
description: Caramelized bananas with rum and ice cream.
instructions:
1. Melt butter and brown sugar.
2. Add banana halves.
3. Add rum and flambe.
4. Serve immediately over ice cream.
